title: Disconnect Keybind
body: # Disconnect Keybind # 1.20.X support! Bind yourself a keybind to Disconnect! - Allows you to bind a keybind to Disconnect from Online Server or Save & Quit to Title Screen. **Check your Controls Settings, Miscellaneous category and change it if you want to change it.** ## Dependencies **Fabric API** **Fabric Language Kotlin**, next to Fabric API is required for this mod to work! This was my first FabricMC mod written in Kotlin, it was pretty fun to try it out that way.
